holdings.infoBox: IGV is an equity ETF with a total of 116 individual holdings. The top holdings are Oracle stock at 9.32%, Palo Alto Networks at 8.40%, Microsoft at 7.80%, Palantir Technologies at 7.02%, and CrowdStrike Holdings at 6.46%.

overview.description: The iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF (IGV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of US and Canadian software companies. IGV was launched on Jul 10, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P North American Expanded Technology Software Index
